title: linaria virgata subsp. tunetana
intro: Linaria virgata subsp. tunetana, also known as the Tunet Larkspur, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
